PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Apr-08-2021 is admitted to probate. Patrick L. Jarvis is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Sep-25-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
